narrative:
Precinct Loudon North (precinct in Seneca County) has 982 registered voters, with 55.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 17.1 percentage points.
